task_description: Implement Phase 5 Observability Dashboard for NexusQueue: Extended REST API endpoints (GET /queues, GET /queues/:name/jobs, POST /jobs/:id/retry, GET /workers, GET /queues/:name/dlq, POST /queues/:name/dlq/requeue), WebSocket event bus with Redis PUB/SUB, and a React dashboard workspace with Vite, Tailwind, Recharts.
review_fixes_applied: 2025-01-15-110000-review.md: Fixed error handler ordering (after routes), removed EventBus monkey-patch (constructor injection), added status query param validation, added DLQ pagination (limit/offset/total), added per-job error tracking in bulk requeue, added worker TODO for event emission. All 75 tests passing.
